meta.poznamky: Smyčka opakuje 3× (špatně, nakreslí jen polovinu). Student musí změnit na 6.

cms.task_text: Kód kreslí šestiúhelník, ale smyčka [hlp]se opakuje jen 3×[/hlp] místo správného počtu. Šestiúhelník má [hlp]6 stran[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">70</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">70</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
